title: Marvell Technology Full Year 2024 Earnings Miss Expectations
text: Marvell Technology reported disappointing full-year 2024 results, with earnings significantly underperforming analyst expectations. The semiconductor company posted a net loss of $933.4 million, representing a substantial deterioration from the prior year. The loss per share came in at $1.08, missing analyst forecasts by 71%. Revenue reached $5.51 billion, which was in line with analyst estimates, though this represented a 7.0% decline year-over-year. Looking ahead, the company faces headwinds relative to its industry peers. Management projects revenue growth of 13% annually over the next three years, lagging the semiconductor industry's forecasted 16% growth rate for the same period. Following the earnings announcement, Marvell's stock declined 2.8% over the subsequent week, reflecting investor disappointment with the results and modest forward guidance.
